traits.name: Grappler
traits.desc: You gain access to the Grapple action.

actions.name: Grapple
actions.text: Replace a melee attack with a Grapple attempt: roll Melee vs target Dodge. On success: target Grappled (cannot move). Escape: target spends 2 AP to roll Dodge opposed by your active Melee; compare Success Levels.

traits.name: Evasive Footwork
traits.desc: Your first Dodge each round costs 0 RAP.

traits.name: Swift Riposte
traits.desc: Your Reaction Attacks cost 1 less RAP (minimum 1).

traits.name: Martial Artist
traits.desc: Unarmed attacks count as Light weapons: damage becomes 1d3 + floor(Might/3).
